news.description: Received the NSF CAREER Award (#2342187, $650,000 over five years) for 'Interpretable Foundations for Trustworthy AI Systems.' The NSF CAREER Award is the National Science Foundation's most prestigious award for early-career faculty.
'Causal Representation Learning with Structural Invariance' (with Jae-Won Kim and Arjun Patel) accepted to ICML 2025. Camera-ready version and code available in April 2025.

Delivered an invited keynote at the NeurIPS 2024 Workshop on Trustworthy Machine Learning in Vancouver, presenting recent results on causal representation learning and its implications for robust generalisation.
Received the annual Northfield University Excellence in Research Award, recognising outstanding research contributions by a faculty member in the natural sciences and engineering.
'Beyond SHAP: Causal Explanations for Black-Box Models' published at KDD 2024; 'Scalable Data Valuation for Collaborative Machine Learning' published in the VLDB Endowment.
Appointed as Associate Editor for the Journal of Machine Learning Research (JMLR), one of the primary open-access venues for fundamental machine learning research.
'Robustness Certificates for Neural Networks via Interval Bound Propagation' received an Honourable Mention for Best Paper at ICLR 2023.
Northfield University's share of the DARPA Guaranteeing AI Robustness Against Deception (GARD) programme renewed with $820,000 in additional funding through 2026.
'Fairness-Aware Learning with Causal Constraints' accepted to NeurIPS 2022, introducing primal-dual training algorithms for enforcing path-specific causal fairness conditions.
Named to the inaugural 'AI's 40 Under 40' list by Science & Technology Review, recognising leading researchers under the age of 40 making significant contributions to artificial intelligence.
